scenarios.docBefore:
# Project Overview

## Introduction

This project aims to build a better markdown editor.

## Goals

- Ship version 1 by Q3
- Achieve 100 daily active users
- Support three AI providers

scenarios.docAfter:
# Technical Spec
## Introduction
\nThis is a technical specification document for a markdown editor, outlining the features and guidelines for its use.\nIt aims to provide a clear and concise guide for users to create high-quality markdown documents.
## Architecture

The system uses three layers.

# Product Roadmap ## Q1 Goals
  • Optimize database queries for faster data retrieval.
  • Reduce memory usage by minimizing object instances.
  • Implement caching mechanisms to improve performance under load.
    • ## Q2 Goals
    • Add support for new UI components.
    • Introduce machine learning algorithms for automated feature generation.
    • Enhance collaboration tools for seamless teamwork.
